field.label: Direct Domain
field.help: Domain for real device IPs (e.g. kimlab.ch)

field.label: Proxy IPv4
field.help: IPv4 address of the reverse proxy (Caddy)

field.label: Proxy IPv6
field.help: IPv6 address of the reverse proxy (Caddy)

field.label: Kea IPv4 Lease File
field.help: Path to the Kea DHCPv4 lease file

field.label: Kea IPv6 Lease File
field.help: Path to the Kea DHCPv6 lease file

field.label: Kea Config File
field.help: Path to the Kea DHCPv4 configuration file

field.label: DNS TTL
field.help: TTL for DNS records in seconds (60-86400)

field.label: Scan Interval
field.help: How often the sync runs (in minutes). Add a matching cron job under System > Settings > Cron.
